finding: Solitary Filling Defect of Small Bowel

differentials.name: INTRINSIC TO BOWEL WALL (a)  benign neoplasm: leiomyoma (97%), adenoma, lipoma, hemangioma, neurofibroma (b)  malignant primary: adenocarcinoma, lymphoma (desmoplastic response), sarcoma, carcinoid (c)  metastases: ← melanoma, lung, kidney, breast
